retry_reason: If hdev is NULL, the device is already gone; retrying will not help. Otherwise, the function performs a one-shot teardown that should succeed deterministically.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is a complete driver close sequence (hardware reset, FPGA off, unregister, free). The call to hci_free_dev is one step among many hardware and registration teardown operations, not the central focus.
